title: Build a Persistent Multi-Service Server
description: Build a production-ready server that can run permanently, handling multiple clients, persisting data, logging activity, and surviving restarts. By the end, you'll have a multi-threaded TCP server with request routing, a database backend, health monitoring, and graceful shutdown — all using concepts from the book.
final_description: A complete persistent server with TCP socket handling, multi-threaded client processing, request routing, SQLite database backend, structured logging, signal-based graceful shutdown, health monitoring, and a command-line management interface — built across 10 chapters using progressively advanced Python application concepts.
